post.description: Trusted SvelteKit server endpoint. Requires an authenticated session.
post.summary: Check whether the current authenticated user has a permission.

401.description: Authenticated session or trusted internal request required.

401.description: Trusted internal request required.

post.summary: Confirm an email address with a six-digit OTP.

401.description: Trusted internal request required.

get.summary: Load the current session from the auth.session_token cookie.

200.description: Current authenticated session, or null when no valid session exists.

post.description: Trusted SvelteKit server endpoint. Requires document.create scoped to the organization unit.
post.summary: Create a root or child document folder.

401.description: Authenticated session or trusted internal request required.

404.description: Organization unit or parent folder not found.

409.description: Active document folder name already exists or parent belongs to another organization unit.

get.description: Trusted SvelteKit server endpoint. Requires document.view scoped to the organization unit.
get.summary: List active document folders for an organization unit as a hierarchy.

401.description: Authenticated session or trusted internal request required.

patch.description: Trusted SvelteKit server endpoint. Requires document.update scoped to the folder's organization unit.
patch.summary: Update an active document folder's details.

401.description: Authenticated session or trusted internal request required.

404.description: Document folder not found or inaccessible.

409.description: Active document folder name already exists or organization unit change was requested.

post.description: Trusted SvelteKit server endpoint. Requires document.delete scoped to the folder's organization unit.
post.summary: Archive an active document folder subtree and active documents under it.

401.description: Authenticated session or trusted internal request required.

404.description: Document folder not found or inaccessible.

get.description: Trusted SvelteKit server endpoint. Requires document.view scoped to the folder's organization unit. Document metadata excludes storage keys.
get.summary: List active child folders and documents in a folder.

200.description: Active child folders and document metadata were listed.

401.description: Authenticated session or trusted internal request required.

404.description: Document folder not found or inaccessible.

patch.description: Trusted SvelteKit server endpoint. Requires document.update scoped to the folder's organization unit.
patch.summary: Move an active document folder to another parent or root.

401.description: Authenticated session or trusted internal request required.

404.description: Document folder not found or inaccessible, or parent not found.

409.description: Move would create a cycle, cross units, or duplicate an active folder name.
